<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Json; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; class JSONMGET extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'JSON.MGET'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { $unpackedArguments = []; foreach ($arguments[0] as $key) { $unpackedArguments[] = $key; } $unpackedArguments[] = $arguments[1]; parent::setArguments($unpackedArguments); } }
